queries.name: tableCount
queries.query: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE'

queries.name: connections
queries.query: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = current_database()) AS active, (SELECT setting::int FROM pg_settings WHERE name = 'max_connections') AS max

queries.name: cacheHitRatio
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN sum(blks_hit) + sum(blks_read) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE round(sum(blks_hit)::numeric / (sum(blks_hit) + sum(blks_read)) * 100, 2) END AS value FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()

queries.name: deadTuples
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: topTableSizes
queries.query: SELECT schemaname || '.' || tablename AS name, pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename) AS size, n_live_tup AS rows FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename) DESC LIMIT 10

queries.name: totalRows
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(n_live_tup), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: totalIndexSize
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(pg_indexes_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename)), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: deadTupleRatio
queries.query: SELECT CASE WHEN coalesce(sum(n_live_tup), 0) + coalesce(sum(n_dead_tup), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE round(sum(n_dead_tup)::numeric / (sum(n_live_tup) + sum(n_dead_tup)) * 100, 2) END AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables

queries.name: longestQuery
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(extract(epoch FROM max(now() - query_start))::numeric, 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active' AND query NOT LIKE '%pg_stat_activity%'

queries.name: replicationLag
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(extract(epoch FROM max(replay_lag))::numeric, 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_replication

queries.name: oldestUnvacuumed
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(extract(epoch FROM (now() - min(last_autovacuum)))::numeric, 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_user_tables WHERE last_autovacuum IS NOT NULL

queries.name: tempBytes
queries.query: SELECT coalesce(sum(temp_bytes), 0) AS value FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database()
